function.message: Before we talk product, tell me whether you actually slept and went outside.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and nested AGENTS requirements; resolved canonical identity from cast record, then exhaustively read every channel transcript.
function.outcome_justification: The target resolves to Sara Demir via 10_entities/cast/sara.md. Across all channel transcript files in 60_outbox/channels, only health_signal.md contains a Sara Demir-authored message, dated 2026-04-30, and no later Sara-authored entries appear in any other channel.
